overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a foggy traditional Japanese interior. The character walks through wooden corridors illuminated by warm lantern light, culminating in a room with dramatic red lighting and a large eye symbol on a shoji screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: entry corridor of traditional Japanese house

events.description: character slides open shoji door and steps from the room into the foggy corridor

agents.ego_description: opening the sliding shoji door and walking into the dimly lit wooden corridor

entered.detail: large round woven basket sitting on top of a wooden cabinet
low wooden furniture with drawers beneath the basket
traditional wooden lattice door with paper panels that the character opens
single warm light source hanging from the ceiling illuminating the fog

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a traditional Japanese room and slides open a shoji door to enter a narrow wooden corridor. A woven basket sits on a cabinet to the left, while a hanging lantern provides warm light ahead through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: long wooden corridor with support pillars and household storage

events.description: character continues walking straight through the corridor, passing wooden support pillars

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the foggy corridor, passing wooden pillars on the right and shelves on the left

entered.detail: thick vertical wooden beam supporting the ceiling structure
open shelving unit with various items and baskets
decorative hanging scroll on the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a long, foggy wooden corridor lined with support pillars on the right and shelves on the left. The hanging lantern moves closer as the character progresses deeper into the traditional Japanese interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: ritual room with red illuminated shoji screen and eye symbol

events.description: ambient lighting shifts dramatically from warm yellow to intense red as character enters the room
giant eye symbol becomes clearly visible on the illuminated shoji screen at the end of the room

agents.ego_description: approaching the shoji screen and stopping to observe the glowing red eye symbol

entered.detail: large painted eye symbol on the shoji screen glowing with intense red light
wooden lattice screen illuminated from behind with dramatic red lighting
low wooden furniture or altar-like structure on the left side of the room

segments.scene_description: The character enters a room where the lighting shifts to intense red, revealing a giant eye symbol glowing on the shoji screen at the far end. The character stops to observe the ominous symbol while standing in the red-lit ritual space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy traditional Japanese interior that transforms from a warm, dimly lit hallway into an ominous red ritual space. It begins in a quiet room where the character slides open a shoji door to enter a narrow wooden corridor, passing a woven basket on a cabinet. As the character progresses deeper into the interior, the camera moves through the long, fog-filled passage lined with support pillars and shelves, drawing closer to a glowing hanging lantern. The scene then shifts abruptly as the character enters a final room where the warm light is replaced by an intense red glow. The movement finally comes to a halt before a giant, glowing eye symbol emblazoned on a shoji screen at the far end of the space.
